description: Standards Anchoring Ecosystem Audit — assessing how well prior audit findings are anchored to formal external standards, proposing missing framework registrations, and documenting compliance posture across security, availability, integrity, accountability, performance, and testability domains.
keyDecisions: Commit directly to main — no PR required.
Standards Register at docs/registers/standards-register.md is the canonical home for all external framework entries (REF-STD-NNN IDs).
Compliance Posture values: Implemented | Partially Implemented | Planned | Non-Compliant.
ISO 22301:2019 is the highest-priority new standard — BCP exists but has no standard anchor.
OWASP ASVS v4 is the highest-value addition for testability evidence against ISO 27001 Clause 8.2.
SLSA Level 2 is largely already implemented (SHA-pinning) — register entry only.
ISO/IEC 42001:2023 deferred status from 260307-iso27001-ai-gaps should be formalised as a Planned registry entry.
